summary: Completed testing of Speechcue SIP Test Page with new OTP-based authentication flow. All 11 backend tests pass. Frontend UI works correctly - page renders with Speechcue branding, OTP input validation works (digits only, 6 char limit), tab switching works, Telegram link correct. Minor frontend issue: intermittent 'body stream already read' error when verifying OTP.

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' error. The API responds correctly (401 for invalid OTP), but the frontend fetch handler occasionally fails to parse the response. This may be related to CDN/Cloudflare edge caching or browser behavior.

action_items: Investigate 'body stream already read' error in OTP verification - may need to clone response before parsing or add response.clone() before resp.json()
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
Environment variables used correctly for backend URL
OTP input correctly filters non-digits and limits to 6 chars
New verify-otp endpoint properly validates OTP format (400 for wrong length, 401 for invalid/expired)
test_credentials: N/A - OTP required from Telegram bot @Nomadlybot
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend OTP flow working correctly. POST /api/phone/test/verify-otp validates OTP format (400 for wrong length, 401 for invalid). Old /api/phone/test/credentials endpoint removed. Frontend UI elements all present with correct data-testids. Minor frontend fetch issue with 'body stream already read' - API response is correct but frontend occasionally fails to parse it.

features_tested.tab_switching: PASS - Free Test and My Credentials tabs work
